ddls:
CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location (e.g., North, South) */,
  "number_of_employees" INTEGER /* Number of employees assigned to this location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the office is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the office is located */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the location */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code of the location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the office is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location for mapping */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location for mapping */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the primary contact person at the location */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email of the primary contact person */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the primary contact person */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the employee */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the employee */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the employee works */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "position" TEXT /* Job position of the employee */,
  "date_hired" TEXT /* Date when the employee was hired */,
  "salary" REAL /* Employee's salary */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the employee belongs to */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manager of the employee */,
  "status" TEXT /* Employment status (e.g., active, on leave, terminated) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the employee */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the employee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department (e.g., HR, Sales) */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location associated with the department */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manager of the department */,
  "budget" REAL /* Annual budget allocated to the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department's responsibilities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Manager, Analyst) */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role's responsibilities */,
  "salary_range_min" REAL /* Minimum salary range for the role */,
  "salary_range_max" REAL /* Maximum salary range for the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_roles_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_roles" (
  "employee_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the employee-role mapping */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the employee */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the employee started in the role */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the employee ended the role (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_roles_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location responsible for the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated to the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., ongoing, completed, delayed) */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project manager */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Date and time of access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, update) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)
